plugins.name: trivial-logger
plugins.description: Log selected events from Claude sessions to a local file for later analysis.

plugins.name: claude-session-reporter
plugins.description: Log events from Claude sessions, filter them and produce summaries for later analysis. All data is saved locally.

plugins.name: catnip
plugins.description: Complexity-Aware Task Navigation and Intelligent Planning. Adjusts model behavior based on the assessed complexity of each user request.

plugins.name: custom-span-tracker
plugins.description: Track user-defined spans: logs prompts, agent replies, skills, subagents, Q&A answers, and snapshots plan/spec/review files on agent edits.
